common.condition_behavior_description: How the state should match on the targeted batteries.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted batteries to trigger on.

is_charging.description: Tests if one or more batteries are charging.
is_charging.name: Battery is charging

is_low.description: Tests if one or more batteries are low.
is_low.name: Battery is low

is_not_charging.description: Tests if one or more batteries are not charging.
is_not_charging.name: Battery is not charging

is_not_low.description: Tests if one or more batteries are not low.
is_not_low.name: Battery is not low

percentage.description: Tests the percentage of one or more batteries.

above.description: Require the percentage to be above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Require the percentage to be below this value.
below.name: Below

percentage.name: Battery percentage

low.description: Triggers after one or more batteries become low.
low.name: Battery low

not_low.description: Triggers after one or more batteries are no longer low.
not_low.name: Battery not low

percentage_changed.description: Triggers after the battery level of one or more batteries changes.

above.description: Only trigger when battery level is above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Only trigger when battery level is below this value.
below.name: Below

percentage_changed.name: Battery level changed

percentage_crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after the battery level of one or more batteries crosses a threshold.

lower_limit.description: The lower limit of the threshold.
lower_limit.name: Lower limit

threshold_type.description: The type of threshold to use.
threshold_type.name: Threshold type

upper_limit.description: The upper limit of the threshold.
upper_limit.name: Upper limit

percentage_crossed_threshold.name: Battery level crossed threshold

started_charging.description: Triggers after one or more batteries start charging.
started_charging.name: Battery started charging

stopped_charging.description: Triggers after one or more batteries stop charging.
stopped_charging.name: Battery stopped charging
